---
title: "wh_excl_da_s2"
output: html_document
date: "2024-07-11"
---

```{r}
# Load necessary libraries
library(here)        # For easier file referencing
library(dplyr)       # For data manipulation
library(mgcv)        # For fitting generalized additive models
library(ggplot2)     # For data visualization
library(readr)       # For reading CSV files
```

```{r}
# Read the data from a CSV file
data <- read.csv("wh_excl_data_s2.csv")
```

```{r}
# Remove rows where the word is "Christmas" from the dataframe
data <- data %>% filter(words != "christmas")

# Remove rows with missing valence_warriner or response
data <- data %>% filter(!is.na(valence_warriner) & !is.na(response))

# Fit the GAM model with response as the outcome variable and valence_warriner as the predictor
model2 <- gam(response ~ s(valence_warriner), data = data, method = "REML")

# Predicted values with confidence intervals from the model
predictions <- predict(model2, newdata = data, se.fit = TRUE)

# Add predicted values and confidence intervals to the data frame
data$predicted <- predictions$fit
data$conf_low <- predictions$fit - 1.96 * predictions$se.fit
data$conf_high <- predictions$fit + 1.96 * predictions$se.fit

# Create a new dataframe plot_df grouped by words
plot_df <- data %>%
  group_by(words) %>%
  summarize(
    inherent_valence = mean(valence_warriner, na.rm = TRUE),
    response_mean = mean(response, na.rm = TRUE),
    ci_low = mean(response, na.rm = TRUE) - 1.96 * sd(response, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    ci_high = mean(response, na.rm = TRUE) + 1.96 * sd(response, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n())
  )

# Add a new column to indicate which points should be red
plot_df <- plot_df %>%
  mutate(color = ifelse(words %in% c("buffoon", "lackey", "retard", "jackass", "exterminator"), "red", "black"))

# Plot the combined data
ggplot(data) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(x = valence_warriner, ymin = conf_low, ymax = conf_high), fill = "grey80", alpha = 0.5) +  # Confidence intervals
  geom_line(aes(x = valence_warriner, y = predicted), color = "#54B0B6", size = 1) +  # Model predictions
  geom_point(data = plot_df, aes(x = inherent_valence, y = response_mean, color = color), alpha = 0.6) +  # Points
  geom_errorbar(data = plot_df, aes(x = inherent_valence, ymin = ci_low, ymax = ci_high, color = color), width = 0.2, alpha = 0.6) +  # Error bars
  geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", size = 0.8) +  # Equality line
  xlab("Inherent Valence") +
  ylab("Embedded Valence") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(1, 8, by = 1)) +  
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(1, 9, by = 1)) + 
  scale_color_identity() +  # Use the color column directly
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",  # Remove legend for the equality line
    axis.text.x = element_text(hjust = 1),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
```
